title: Supreme Court orders SIT probe into illegal sale of land belonging to Maharishi Mahesh Yogi-founded society
description: The Supreme Court has ordered a Special Investigation Team (SIT) probe into the alleged illegal sale of properties belonging to the Spiritual Regeneration Movement Foundation of India, a society founded under the guidance of spiritual leader Maharishi Mahesh Yogi [Shrikant Ojha v State of UP & Ors].A Bench of Justice JK Maheshwari and Justice Atul S Chandurkar observed that several FIRs had already been registered over allegations that society land was being sold without permission, defeatin
